title: Did Shinji impregnate Asuka
wikitext:
[]: Did Shinji impregnate Asuka? Post by Mortician69 » Tue Nov 03, 2009 9:44 am I'm on the line about this one. I think no, but I do believe that Shinji and Asuka have had sex. Many people cite Asuka's seemingly bulging belly whilst bathing as countering evidence.

[]: Post by Xard » Tue Nov 03, 2009 9:57 am [URL=http://img134.imageshack.us/i/lolwuta.jpg/] [/URL]

[]: Post by Mortician69 » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:02 am It was a subject of debate at an Otacon I attended. Is the question that strange?

[]: Post by Xard » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:08 am Mortician69 wrote: It was a subject of debate at an Otacon I attended. Is the question that strange?

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:10 am Did Shinji impregnate Asuka?

[]: Post by Mortician69 » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:15 am I agree with you... Rhuby Rhod. Shinji doesn't seem quite man enough to slip one past the goalie at that particular time in his life, so to speak. testing to see if kana works here ???? ????

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 03, 2009 10:33 am Xard wrote: only times I've heard stuff remotely like this are - the ... crackpot EoE commentary track - The hilarious intentional overanalysis by NaveryW

[]: Post by Shin-seiki » Tue Nov 03, 2009 11:23 am Xard wrote: - The hilarious intentional overanalysis ("Shinji and Asuka had sex") Shin-seiki (IIRC) made years ago

[]: Post by Xard » Tue Nov 03, 2009 11:24 am Shin-seiki wrote: Xard wrote: - The hilarious intentional overanalysis ("Shinji and Asuka had sex") Shin-seiki (IIRC) made years ago

[]: Post by esselfortium » Tue Nov 03, 2009 11:40 am No. Just no. Like, seriously, just...no.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 03, 2009 11:44 am Shin-seiki wrote: Xard wrote: - The hilarious intentional overanalysis ("Shinji and Asuka had sex") Shin-seiki (IIRC) made years ago

[]: Post by Lucretius » Tue Nov 03, 2009 12:18 pm @topic

[]: Post by Uriel Septim VII » Tue Nov 03, 2009 12:45 pm It was Kaji...

[]: Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Nov 03, 2009 12:55 pm wha? no. That sex scene didn't happen in reality. It was more of a metaphysical sex scene, thus it never happened at all. I wouldn't even call it a sex scene, either

[]: Post by Uriel Septim VII » Tue Nov 03, 2009 12:56 pm GasmaskAvenger wrote: wha? no. That sex scene didn't happen in reality. It was more of a metaphysical sex scene, thus it never happened at all. I wouldn't even call it a sex scene, either

[]: Post by Xard » Tue Nov 03, 2009 1:04 pm Uriel Septim VII wrote: Wait, my parents did what???!!

[]: Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Nov 03, 2009 1:48 pm Yes, they totally did have sex...............Yup.

[]: Re: Did Shinji impregnate Asuka? Post by master_lloyd » Tue Nov 03, 2009 1:57 pm Mortician69 wrote: Many people cite Asuka's seemingly bulging belly whilst bathing as countering evidence.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 03, 2009 2:12 pm And as I mentioned before, Asuka clutching her stomach/complaining about feeling sick in 22' is because of her period, so that's out. Besides, the blood/rust in 24' is around Asuka's wrists as well as apparently her groin (though I kinda doubt she's already on her period so soon because there's only an episode between them). Like I said, Instrumentality=spiritual sex/joining of minds & souls. The scenes of Asuka atop Shinji then Rei atop Shinji is meant to be metaphysical NOT literal.

[]: Post by Xard » Tue Nov 03, 2009 2:37 pm is there any proof ep 24 took place immeaditly after ep 22? Frankly that's impossible due to various reasons, not least of which is Asuka/Hikari scene in ep 23 which implies Asuka has been living in her house for days already.
